description_long: This sculpture features an abstract, elongated humanoid bust with exaggerated facial features and a stylized, angular headpiece. The face is narrow with deep-set eyes and pronounced cheekbones, giving it an enigmatic, almost alien appearance. The head transitions into a broad, flowing base that mimics draped fabric or organic forms, with sharp ridges and smooth curves. The material appears to be a weathered, patinated metal, likely bronze, with a greenish-blue hue and subtle brownish highlights at the edges. The overall form is both elegant and otherworldly, with a sense of movement in the flowing lower section. The sculpture is solid and compact, suitable for display in an urban public space.
description: An abstract humanoid bust with a stylized, angular headpiece and flowing, organic base, rendered in weathered greenish-blue metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elongated face, deep-set eyes, and symmetrical, angular headpiece.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pronounced ear, sloped headpiece, and flowing, draped base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad, smooth back of the headpiece and the symmetrical, organic base.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible ear and the dynamic curves of the base.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture could be suited for an outdoor plaza, park, or urban streetscape.
